use_cases: Displaying service offerings in a scrollable carousel format
Highlighting features or capabilities with visual cards
Creating a services overview section for business websites
Organizing and presenting multiple service items in a compact layout
ai_summary: A services card component featuring a carousel layout for showcasing multiple service offerings. The card likely includes icons, titles, descriptions, and action buttons. Designed with a minimalist aesthetic suitable for SaaS and business service platforms, it provides an elegant way to present services in a scannable format with smooth navigation between items.
